case_title: MOSSER COMPANIES VS. AMELIA PATRICIA GOCHEZ et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOCHEZ, AMELIA PATRICIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 146 MCALLISTER STREET, APARTMENT NUMBER 607, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
DECLARATION DAVID P. WASSERMAN FILED RE: COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $33.46 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GOCHEZ, AMELIA PATRICIA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES AS TO DEFENDANT GOCHEZ, AMELIA PATRICIA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT **PRE-JUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION**, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES SERVED FEB-17-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOCHEZ, AMELIA PATRICIA

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GOCHEZ, AMELIA PATRICIA
